locations_inspected.name: Lone Star Property Holdings, LP
findings: Dry Pipe sprinkler system, 20 years old, manufactured by Reliable, NFPA 13 Compliant
6 control valves inspected — all found in open position
Sprinkler heads visual condition: Fair — minor corrosion observed
Spare heads in cabinet: Yes — adequate supply
deficiencies: [Priority] Combustible storage within 18 inches of sprinkler deflectors
[Code] Exposed wiring and missing junction box covers in main electrical room

recommendations.description: Combustible storage within 18 inches of sprinkler deflectors must be relocated to maintain required clearance
Exposed wiring and missing junction box covers in main electrical room must be remediated to meet code requirements

overall_assessment.summary: Inspection conducted on 01/14/2026 at 8117 Preston Road, Dallas, TX. The 20-year-old dry pipe sprinkler system received an overall system status of PASS; however, the property was graded Below Average on the Travelers Risk Assessment scale. Key concerns include tamper switches not fully connected on control valves, minor corrosion on sprinkler heads, combustible storage encroaching within 18 inches of sprinkler deflectors, and exposed wiring with missing junction box covers in the main electrical room.
